description: Complete RTL support for FA locale - icons flip, text alignment, full translation coverage, all components
steps: 1. Expand [dir=rtl] CSS rules in panel/panel/web/admin/src/style.css to cover ALL components comprehensively: (a) Icons should move to left side - add flex-direction:row-reverse to all icon+text containers, (b) Text alignment - all text starts from right, (c) Margins/paddings that use left/right need swapping, (d) Fixed-position elements (toast, dropdowns) need mirror positioning, (e) Grid/flex layouts that assume LTR need direction:rtl or explicit reversal. Target: node-card headers, metric rows, protocol cards, form fields with icons, stat cards, dashboard sections.

2. Add comprehensive [dir=rtl] rules to the portal: In the new SinglePageView.vue scoped styles and PortalShell.vue, add RTL rules for all sections. The profile cards, usage gauge labels, VPN download buttons, support ticket list all need RTL treatment.

3. Complete FA translations: Audit ALL English strings that appear in the rendered UI. In panel/panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts, identify any keys that have English values but missing/incomplete FA translations. The portal's i18n.ts needs extensive FA translations for the new single-page content. Check DashboardView (admin), NodesView, SettingsView, CustomersView for any hardcoded English strings not using t().

4. Fix specific RTL issues: (a) Sidebar nav icons must appear on LEFT in RTL (they are on right in LTR) - already handled by flex-direction:row-reverse on .nav-item, (b) KDataTable column alignment should respect dir, (c) KButton icons should flip sides, (d) Form labels should be right-aligned, (e) Number inputs should remain LTR (numbers are universal), (f) Breadcrumb arrows should reverse.
5. Ensure the portal header in PortalShell.vue correctly mirrors in RTL: brand on right, user menu on left. The hamburger/mobile menu should respect RTL ordering.
acceptance_criteria: When FA is selected, document has dir=rtl and ALL text flows right-to-left
Nav icons appear on left side of text in RTL mode
No English words remain visible in FA mode (all UI strings translated)
Toast notifications appear on left side in RTL
Form layouts properly mirror (labels right-aligned, inputs properly positioned)
Admin dashboard, nodes, customers, settings all render correctly in RTL
Portal single page renders correctly in RTL with proper section ordering
findings: Comprehensive RTL support implemented across all admin and portal views. DashboardView had 12+ hardcoded English strings (stat labels, panel titles, table headers, empty states) which were all converted to t() with FA/ZH translations. Added 8 new dashboard i18n keys per locale. RTL CSS expanded to 78+ new rules in style.css plus scoped RTL rules in all 5 view components. Toast on left side in RTL, icons move to left via flex-direction:row-reverse, text-align:right throughout, number inputs retain LTR. All builds pass (vue-tsc + vite build for both admin and portal).
